refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify key analysis components (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) to ensure clarity and verifiability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, detected obstacles, and clearly marked work zones, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.
DP2: Employ GIS-based digital mapping for work-zone representation.
DP3: Integrate sensor data with real-time processing algorithms for dynamic worksite modeling.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.

potential_sources: Sensor data processing tightly coupled with terrain and obstacle analysis.
Work-zone representation logically separated via GIS mapping.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 focuses on core sensing and mapping, minimizing coupling with work-zone representation handled separately.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model fidelity.
High safety criticality requires robust obstacle detection.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing work-zone representation separately to reduce coupling and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Central processing and integration of sensor data for worksite mapping and modeling.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote systems and Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of mapping logic and data processing; low diffusion risk.
Limited containment; risk of duplicated sensor processing if assigned here.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all sensor data processing centralized.
Dependency on reliable Telemetry interface from Vehicle.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor performance and consider offloading pre-processing to Vehicle module if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment; interfaces align with known system boundaries.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing integrated system outputs and sensor data processing correctness.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functions to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider further decomposition of work-zone representation in future levels.
Evaluate sensor data pre-processing distribution for performance optimization.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of work-zone representation and potential DP modularization is recommended to reduce coupling and improve maintainability.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

revise.why: To explicitly separate work-zone representation for clearer DP and IM assignments.

assumptions: Sensor data is reliable and available via Telemetry interface.
NGHE Solution module has sufficient processing capacity.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution processing.
